PowerShell($keyEnvSystem = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('Security__EncryptionKey', 'Machine'\); Write-Output "system Machine env Security__EncryptionKey: $keyEnvSystem"; $sha = [System.Security.Cryptography.SHA256]::Create\(\); $fp = [System.BitConverter]::ToString\($sha.ComputeHash\([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($keyEnvSystem\)\)\).Replace\('-',''\).ToLower\(\).Substring\(0,8\); Write-Output "fp do system env:                         $fp"; Write-Output "fp do que o Electron usou \(do log\):       88d6d458"; if \($fp -eq '88d6d458'\) { Write-Output 'MATCH — chave do arquivo == chave do system env. Decriptacao agora vai bater.' } else { Write-Output 'MISMATCH — chaves divergem' })
